generated_oml:
instance LowerLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower level chassis handling steering and speed control"
]

instance UpperLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper level chassis mounting autonomy components like Jetson NX and Orin Nano"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity implementing physical components and sensors"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity processing sensor data and running models"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity providing UI for operator transparency"
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle steering"
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor measuring current speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring wheel position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data from sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image data from Intel D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance VehicleStateSQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Jetpack5SDK
]

instance VehicleStateReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state reports for operator transparency"
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualizations of tracked objects from sensor data"
]

instance ACCDecisionMaking : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC decision-making for speed adjustment based on lead vehicle distance"
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic speed adjustment command for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual remote control action for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance 3DVisualizationOfEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of the vehicle's surrounding environment"
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI for vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateReport, ObjectTrackVisualization
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system executed remotely for computation offloading"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionMaking, SpeedAdjustmentAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteACCControlAction
]

instance 3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of the vehicle environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides 3DVisualizationOfEnvironment
]

instance Jetpack5SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for system integration and storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for real-time communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for data processing and UI implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance system integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and system integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, 3DVisualizationService
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Collection Functional Entity for sensor data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Functional Entity for serialization and unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DBSCANPointClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering using DBSCAN algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control logic per ISO 15622 standard"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Cpp
]

instance VehiclePhysicalEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment of the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle"
    base:contains LowerLevelChassis, UpperLevelChassis, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance VehicleDigitalEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital environment for the twin"
    base:contains DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands such as desired speed, emergency braking, and ACC enable/disable are sent from the Digital Twin Entity to the Physical Twin Entity, where the Actuation FE converts them into motor voltage and steering servo commands."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) interconnected via ROS2 for intra-entity communication and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, with Data Translation FE handling data serialization and protocol conversion."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during design phase for experimentation and validation, and during operational phase for real-time monitoring and control of the adaptive cruise control system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implementation follows ISO 15622 performance class I requirements; hardware limitations affect clock synchronization accuracy to 100 ms; no explicit verification/validation methods beyond standard compliance."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components within ROS2 network; inter-entity communication over Wi-Fi; no OPC UA implementation (only mentioned as a possible example in ISO 23247 standard, not used in this case study)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted Jetson hardware; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity hosted remotely, likely in cloud infrastructure for computation offloading."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Only referenced 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements; no explicit integration with external information systems beyond the DT system itself."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture, ISO 15622 for ACC functionality, and 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with requirements for ≤100 ms latency and clock synchronization accuracy to ensure real-time operation; specific cybersecurity measures or safety protocols for remote operations are not detailed in the document."
]
